paragraphs.title: Case class definitions.
paragraphs.text:
import org.apache.spark.sql.types.DecimalType
import scala.collection.mutable.ArrayBuffer
case class s3TQu(dimension:String,Degree:String,scalar:String,index:String,maxIndex:String,divisor:String,rowCounter:String)
case class s3TQuD(dimension:String,Degree:String,scalar:String,index:DecimalType,maxIndex:String,divisor:String,rowCounter:DecimalType)
case class s3TRe(dimension:String,Degree:String,scalar:String,index:String,maxIndex:String,divisor:String,rowCounter:String,result:String)
case class rResult(rowCounter:String,n:String, maxN:String,dim:String,rowResult:BigDecimal)
case class indexSum(iSum:String,finalISum:String)
case class consistant(rowCounter:BigDecimal,n:BigDecimal, maxN:String,dim:BigDecimal)
case class tupleQuippy(terms:ArrayBuffer[s3TQu],result:BigDecimal)

paragraphs.title: IndexRowsSum object aggrigates result column of  "extendResultDS" Dataset.
paragraphs.text:
import org.apache.spark.sql.{Encoder, Encoders, SparkSession}
import org.apache.spark.sql.expressions.Aggregator
import spark.implicits._
import org.apache.spark.sql.Dataset
import scala.math.BigDecimal

object IndexRowsSum extends Aggregator[s3TRe, indexSum, String] {

  def zero: indexSum = indexSum("0", "0")
  
  def reduce(buffer: indexSum, s3TR: s3TRe): indexSum = {
    val red1= BigDecimal(buffer.iSum)+BigDecimal(s3TR.result)
    val red2=buffer.finalISum  
    indexSum(red1.bigDecimal.toPlainString,red2)
  }
  
  def merge(b1: indexSum, b2: indexSum): indexSum = {
    val mer1=BigDecimal(b1.iSum)+BigDecimal(b2.iSum)
    val mer2=b1.finalISum
    indexSum(mer1.bigDecimal.toPlainString,mer2)
  }
 
  def finish(reduction: indexSum): String = reduction.iSum

  def bufferEncoder: Encoder[indexSum] = Encoders.product

  def outputEncoder: Encoder[String] = Encoders.STRING
}

val ds= z.get("extendResultDS").asInstanceOf[Dataset[s3TRe]]
ds.schema
ds.show 

 val indexResult = IndexRowsSum.toColumn.name("index_Result")
val iResult = ds.select(indexResult)
iResult.show()

paragraphs.title: GroupedIndexRowsSum first groups "extendResultDS" Dataset by rowCounter then aggrigates result column.
